title: 12 inch Stainless Steel Ruler Metric and SAE Measurements
description:
Every artist, craftsman, student and hobbyist needs a ruler. This stainless steel 12"/30cm precision ruler provides accuracy you can count on. You don't have to worry about the edges deforming the way cheap plastic and wood rulers do. This is essential for art, drafting, and other precise detail work. It won't rust, break, melt or burn, making it ideal for carpentry, metalwork, and woodworking projects. The old saying "Buy well, buy once" fits this high quality ruler perfectly.
